name: Deal Prioritization Brief
description: A weekly memo telling a rep where to focus this week — which open deals deserve effort, which signals matter, and which deals to consider de-prioritizing. Replaces gut-feel triage with explicit reasoning.
alsoSurfaces: Which deals should I focus on this week, and why?
Which open deals should I de-prioritize or close out?
Which signals on each top deal demand attention right now?
Where are managers and reps likely to disagree on priorities?
beforeWeRun: Owner scope — single rep, or rolled up to a manager view?
How many top deals to include — 5, 8, or 12?

whatYoullGet.name: Top focus this week
whatYoullGet.desc: Numbered list of top deals. Each entry: name, account, value, stage, expected close date, a one-paragraph "why this matters", and a recommended next action.

whatYoullGet.name: Drop list
whatYoullGet.desc: De-prioritization candidates with reason (stalled / aged / low probability) and recommended action (close-lost, downgrade, backburner).

whatYoullGet.name: Why this list?
whatYoullGet.desc: Two-paragraph narrative explaining the prioritization reasoning, referencing the score weights.

whatYoullGet.name: Sources & definitions
whatYoullGet.desc: Priority score formula with weights, period boundaries, data sources read with row counts.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your weekly priorities memo in ~11 min.
